overall.description: A nighttime walk through a dystopian industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves through narrow alleyways and open yards, passing by NPCs, industrial machinery, and a Netwatch vehicle, with warm artificial lighting illuminating the decaying urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial service alley with metal fencing

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through a dark narrow alleyway between industrial buildings

entered.detail: tall metal security fence running along the right side of the alley
weathered concrete wall with industrial piping on the left side
stacked wooden pallets leaning against the wall
large metal pipes running overhead along the alley
closed metal gate blocking the end of the passage
single street lamp casting yellow-orange light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed industrial alleyway at night. The camera moves forward past a metal fence on the right and concrete walls on the left, with wooden pallets and overhead pipes visible. Warm artificial lighting from a distant street lamp illuminates the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with group gathering

events.description: exits narrow alley into open industrial yard with crowd of people

agents.ego_description: approaching and moving through a group of gathered NPCs in an open yard

entered.detail: wide open space between industrial buildings with scattered debris
concrete wall covered in white graffiti tags and street art
massive industrial fan mounted on the wall
metal scaffolding structure against the building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide industrial courtyard where a crowd of NPCs has gathered. The camera moves through the group, passing graffiti-covered walls and approaching a large ventilation fan. Street lamps provide warm lighting over the dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial ventilation area with large wall-mounted fan

agents.ego_description: moving past the large ventilation fan and approaching the Netwatch vehicle

notable_agents.action: NPCs walking near the large industrial fan structure

entered.detail: large black armored vehicle with NETWATCH text and red accent lighting
elevated metal walkway or platform structure

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the industrial zone, the camera passes the massive ventilation fan on the left and approaches a parked Netwatch armored vehicle. A few NPCs walk through the area as the camera continues forward through the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial checkpoint with armored Netwatch vehicle

events.description: camera moves past the Netwatch vehicle and continues deeper into the industrial area

agents.ego_description: passing by the parked Netwatch vehicle and continuing through the industrial zone

notable_agents.action: NPC walking alongside the Netwatch vehicle

entered.detail: large concrete pipes stacked on the ground
portable metal barricades lining the path
metal scaffolding against the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the Netwatch vehicle, which shifts from right to left in the frame. Concrete pipes and metal barriers line the path as the scene continues through the industrial complex with scaffolding and machinery visible.

events.description: enters narrow enclosed passage between concrete industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow passage toward a lit doorway or opening

entered.detail: tight corridor between tall industrial buildings
large industrial garage door at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions back to a narrow enclosed passage between concrete buildings. The camera moves toward a metal roll-up door at the end, passing concrete drainage pipes and a loading platform, with industrial steam pipes visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial alleyway that opens into a bustling courtyard before returning to a narrow concrete passage. It begins by moving forward through a tight corridor of concrete walls and overhead pipes, guided by the warm glow of a distant street lamp. As the path expands, the camera pushes through a crowd of NPCs gathered in a wide, graffiti-strewn courtyard under the light of several street lamps. The scene then shifts deeper into the industrial zone, passing a massive ventilation fan and a parked Netwatch armored vehicle before gliding past scaffolding and metal barriers. Finally, the environment tightens once more as the camera enters a narrow passage lined with drainage pipes, moving toward a metal roll-up door beneath a network of steaming industrial pipes.
